_doc: Faithful replay: a UiPath.SAP.BAPI.Activities SAP Application Scope faults with UiPath.SAP.BAPI.Utilities.SapActivityException 'Advanced Parameters has invalid parameter <key>. Connection cannot be established.' (from SapConnectionService.OverideWithAdvancedParameters) because an unsupported RFC advanced-parameter key was configured. Signature captured verbatim from a live uip rpa run (no SAP system - fails at advanced-param parsing before any network call); workflow/process names neutralized. The agent must read the invalid advanced-parameter as the cause (a UiPath-layer config check before connect), not blame the BAPI, host reachability, or logon. First-match-wins.

expected_calls.description: Agent lists faulted jobs in Shared to find the failing job.
Agent fetches the faulted job to read the SapActivityException invalid-advanced-parameter signature.
